'''鈭歞-t-dh-w''' ('''kadatdhewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:woobify|woobify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-t-dh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woobify|woobify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-t-dh-w
|-
! Lemma
| kadatdhewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidatdhewoko|thidatdhewoko]] || [[word:jidatdhewoko|jidatdhewoko]] || [[word:shidatdhewoko|shidatdhewoko]] || [[word:kidatdhewoko|kidatdhewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudatdhewoko|thuthudatdhewoko]] || [[word:jujudatdhewoko|jujudatdhewoko]] || [[word:shushudatdhewoko|shushudatdhewoko]] || [[word:kukudatdhewoko|kukudatdhewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudatdhewoko|thudatdhewoko]] || [[word:judatdhewoko|judatdhewoko]] || [[word:shudatdhewoko|shudatdhewoko]] || [[word:kudatdhewoko|kudatdhewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudatdhewoko|thudatdhewoko]] || [[word:judatdhewoko|judatdhewoko]] || [[word:shudatdhewoko|shudatdhewoko]] || [[word:kudatdhewoko|kudatdhewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedatdhewoko|thedatdhewoko]] || [[word:jedatdhewoko|jedatdhewoko]] || [[word:shedatdhewoko|shedatdhewoko]] || [[word:kedatdhewoko|kedatdhewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodatdhewoko|thothodatdhewoko]] || [[word:jojodatdhewoko|jojodatdhewoko]] || [[word:shoshodatdhewoko|shoshodatdhewoko]] || [[word:kokodatdhewoko|kokodatdhewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodatdhewoko|thodatdhewoko]] || [[word:jodatdhewoko|jodatdhewoko]] || [[word:shodatdhewoko|shodatdhewoko]] || [[word:kodatdhewoko|kodatdhewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodatdhewoko|thodatdhewoko]] || [[word:jodatdhewoko|jodatdhewoko]] || [[word:shodatdhewoko|shodatdhewoko]] || [[word:kodatdhewoko|kodatdhewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙datdhewoko|th忙datdhewoko]] || [[word:j忙datdhewoko|j忙datdhewoko]] || [[word:sh忙datdhewoko|sh忙datdhewoko]] || [[word:k忙datdhewoko|k忙datdhewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadatdhewoko|thathadatdhewoko]] || [[word:jajadatdhewoko|jajadatdhewoko]] || [[word:shashadatdhewoko|shashadatdhewoko]] || [[word:kakadatdhewoko|kakadatdhewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadatdhewoko|thadatdhewoko]] || [[word:jadatdhewoko|jadatdhewoko]] || [[word:shadatdhewoko|shadatdhewoko]] || [[word:kadatdhewoko|kadatdhewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadatdhewoko|thadatdhewoko]] || [[word:jadatdhewoko|jadatdhewoko]] || [[word:shadatdhewoko|shadatdhewoko]] || [[word:kadatdhewoko|kadatdhewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
